name: xlayer-agent-nexus
description: X Layer Agent Marketplace - Autonomous Agent-to-Agent service discovery, execution, and payment on X Layer. Powered by OnchainOS + Uniswap AI Skills.
author: CryptoPothunter

capabilities.name: swap_optimize
capabilities.description: Find the best swap route across OnchainOS DEX (500+ sources) and Uniswap

capabilities.name: token_scan
capabilities.description: Comprehensive security scan for tokens and contracts on X Layer

capabilities.name: price_alert
capabilities.description: Set up price monitoring alerts for X Layer tokens

capabilities.name: discover_services
capabilities.description: Find available agent services on the marketplace

capabilities.name: register_service
capabilities.description: Register a new service on the agent marketplace
